articles.author: Conor Murray
articles.title: Nvidia’s AI-Powered Photorealistic Gaming Technology Roasted As ‘AI Slop’ - Forbes
articles.description: Nvidia promised its new technology is a “dramatic leap in visual realism,” though gamers voiced fears it will diminish the artistic appearance of video games.
articles.content: Nvidia unveiled the newest version of its DLSS video game graphics technology, which is meant to make games look especially realisticbut it is getting roasted by gamers and content creators across so… [+4625 chars]
